overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring an indoor space station or ship interior. The character walks through a lobby area with industrial architecture, passes a reception desk, and enters a back storage room. The environment features warm artificial lighting, exposed pipes, and metallic surfaces.

events.description: character stops walking and pauses briefly

agents.ego_description: walking through the lobby area, pausing briefly to look around before continuing toward the corridor

person sitting on a bench in the background

entered.detail: large curved desk with red countertop and metallic base
long rectangular light fixtures mounted on the exposed ceiling
upholstered bench seating against the left wall
rectangular ventilation grate on the brown wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores a lobby area of a space station with industrial architecture. An armored guard stands to the right while another person sits on a bench to the left. The character walks forward, pauses briefly, then continues toward a curved reception desk.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception corridor leading to back rooms

events.description: moving from the open lobby into the narrower corridor section

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corridor past the reception desk toward the door at the end

stacked containers and equipment along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a carpeted corridor with a curved reception desk receding to the left. The environment features exposed industrial piping on the ceiling and fluorescent lighting. The character approaches a metal door at the end of the hallway.

events.description: approaching and entering the door at the end of the corridor
character enters the smaller back room

agents.ego_description: opening the door and entering the storage room at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: metal door frame leading into the utility room
tall metal shelving unit with various items
plastic containers and boxes on the floor
white safety railing near a lower level

segments.scene_description: The character enters a smaller utility room through a metal door. The room contains metal shelving units, storage boxes, and industrial equipment. The space is more confined than the previous corridor, with a white safety railing visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a spacious industrial lobby that gradually narrows into a confined utility storage room. It begins in an open station area where the character passes an armored guard and a seated figure before advancing toward a curved reception desk. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a carpeted corridor defined by overhead fluorescent lighting and exposed industrial piping that leads toward a distant metal door. The camera then follows the character through this doorway, transitioning from the wide hallway into a cramped utility space. Finally, the environment closes in around metal shelving units, storage boxes, and a white safety railing.
